doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by licensed lawyers and does not contain these fabricated subsections about paralegal supervision, definitions of "practice of law," or statements about "emergency exceptio
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by licensed lawyers (temporary practice, association with local counsel, etc.) and does not contain subsections defining "practice of law," regulating paralegal activities, or discussing "emergency exceptions" — this document fabricates detailed provisions that do not exist in the real rule.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by licensed lawyers and does not contain these fabricated subsections about paralegal supervision, definitions of "practice of law," or statements about "emergency exceptions."
